scripts.release-admin: shorebird release android -t lib/main_admin.dart --flavor admin --artifact apk -- --obfuscate --split-debug-info=build/app/outputs/symbols && copy build\app\outputs\flutter-apk\app-admin-release.apk build\app\outputs\flutter-apk\admin-release.apk
scripts.release-customer: shorebird release android -t lib/main_customer.dart --flavor customer --artifact apk -- --obfuscate --split-debug-info=build/app/outputs/symbols && copy build\app\outputs\flutter-apk\app-customer-release.apk build\app\outputs\flutter-apk\customer-release.apk
scripts.build-and-deploy: npm run release-admin && npm run release-customer && npm run deploy-apps
